creator: nick@kirby.cx
text:
Created attachment 250346
New port py-apprise 1.7.6 v6

Add py-paho-mqtt listed in sabnzbd requirements for py-apprise, but not listed in apprise requirements.txt.

How should this be handled? As an option? In the sabnzbd Makefile? Or is it fine since py-apprise is new and only going to be required by sabnzbd 4.3.0?
